§6RBMK Reactor§f

§aThe ultimate fission reactor — modular, powerful, and catastrophically dangerous if mismanaged!§f

The §bRBMK§f (High-Power Channel-Type Reactor) is a modular boiling-water fission reactor that generates immense power. It consists entirely of columns (default §e4 blocks§f tall, configurable 2–16). Each column has a specific function, exchanging heat with adjacent columns to equalize temperature.

§c⚠ Critical Warning§f: If any column reaches §e1,500°C§f, the reactor explodes violently, ignoring all blast resistance, spraying radioactive scrap everywhere, and dripping corium.

§6Basic Terminology§f:
§b• Neutron Flux§f — the driver of fission. Fuel rods generate neutrons that sustain the chain reaction.
§b• Fast vs Slow Neutrons§f — fast neutrons must be moderated (slowed down) to react with most fuels. Slow neutrons pass through moderators freely.
§b• Xenon Poisoning§f — buildup of Xenon-135 reduces reactivity. Can be burned away with strong flux input. Some fuels are immune.

§6Neutron Mechanics§f:
• Standard rods emit neutrons in 4 cardinal directions (+ shape)
• ReaSim rods emit in 8 directions (⁕ shape), each at §e75%§f strength
• Neutrons can leak out if not sealed with §bRBMK Cover Panels§f
• §bGraphite Moderators§f convert fast neutrons to slow
• §bNeutron Reflectors§f bounce neutrons back to their source
• §bNeutron Absorbers§f absorb all flux, converting to heat (1°C per 20 flux)

§6Column Types§f: Fuel Channel, Steam Channel, Control Rod, Moderator, Reflector, Absorber, Irradiation Channel, Fluid Heater, Cooler, Storage Column, Structural Column

§6Meltdown§f: Heat >1,500°C on any column = explosion. Fuel skin temp exceeding melting point also triggers meltdown. The cleanup requires extensive radiation protection gear.

§6Pros§f: BWR (no coolant needed), huge power, most efficient fission reactor, 100% modular, aesthetic.
§6Cons§f: Egregiously expensive (asbestos + rare earths), violent meltdowns, complex design.

§eTip§f: Test designs in creative mode with §b/dialDisableMeltdowns true§f! Use the §bAZ-5§f button on the RBMK Console as an emergency SCRAM.
